author: anon-ab6221f8
content:
Shipped in a33f20f5. Whole alert row now clickable (+ Enter/Space keyboard); expansion surfaces kind-specific actions:

• lock:<id>: Release / Steal
• agent:<id>: Pause / Resume / Kill (via the git-native agent request protocol)
• issue:<id>: Close + inline Comment textarea (overdue_issue, orphan_subissue)
• project:<slug> / commit:<sha> / no-subject: Open project → link only

Reuses all existing write-surface hooks so audit/signing/hub-push behave identically to the project-detail flow. Project link in the summary + action buttons stopPropagation so clicks on them don't also toggle expansion. Local-only issues (UUID, no display_id) hide the action buttons since the CLI write surface only accepts numeric IDs.

Accessibility: role=button + aria-expanded + aria-label per row. parseSubjectRef exported for tests. 14 new vitest cases (parseSubjectRef edge cases, collapsed/expanded, keyboard toggle, each kind's action set, subject-less fallback, local-only hide, link-doesn't-toggle); full suite 95/95.
